📈 Year-wise Projection
💡 SIP Strategy Tips
For your aggressive mid/small cap portfolio:

Step-Up SIP: Increase monthly amount by 10% each year. At ₹10K/mo growing 10%/yr over 10 years at 15% CAGR → ₹1.3Cr vs ₹27L flat SIP.

Momentum-Based DCA: Deploy more when RSI < 40 (oversold), reduce when RSI > 70. Small caps mean-revert faster.

Satellite-Core split: 60% in large/midcap for stability, 40% in high-conviction small caps for alpha. Rebalance quarterly.

Tax-smart SIP: Set purchase date to 2nd of month — avoids monthly F&O expiry volatility on last Thursday.

✅ The biggest SIP mistake is stopping during corrections. Down 20%? Your SIP is now buying the same stock 20% cheaper.

📋 Import Log
Waiting…
📖 Broker Export Guide
Groww: Portfolio → ⋮ → Download Report (Holdings) · Reports → P&L → Download CSV
Zerodha: Console → Portfolio → Holdings → Download ↓ (Holdings CSV) · Console → Reports → Tradebook → Download
Upstox: Portfolio → Holdings → Export CSV · Reports → Trade History → Export
Tickertape: Portfolio → Export → Download CSV
Zerodha Tradebook: Uploaded to Holdings section — BUY trades are aggregated per symbol automatically.

⚠ Always export as CSV (not PDF). If export gives .xlsx, open in Excel → Save As → CSV UTF-8.

🔔 Push Notifications

⚙ Risk Profile
🏦 Angel One SmartAPI
Connect Angel One for live positions, real-time P&L, and one-click order placement. Get your API key from smartapi.angelbroking.com
Credentials stored locally only. Never sent to any server except Angel One's API directly.
🛡 Allocation Guard
Set limits to prevent over-concentration. Dashboard flags breaches automatically.
Holdings above these limits show a red ⚠ on the dashboard and holdings table.
📬 Telegram Alerts
Get SL breaches, RSI alerts, and entry zone hits sent to your Telegram — even when the app is closed.
1. Message @BotFather on Telegram → /newbot → copy your bot token
2. Start a chat with your bot, then open: https://api.telegram.org/bot<TOKEN>/getUpdates
3. Copy your chat_id from the response and paste below
Alerts sent for: SL breach · RSI overbought/oversold cross · Entry zone hit · Earnings in 2 days

💾 Backup & Restore
Export your portfolio to a JSON file and re-import it anytime — across browsers, devices, or after clearing browser data.
❓ Help & Guide
🚀 Getting Started
  1. Add Holdings — Go to Portfolio → Holdings → "+ Add Stock". Enter symbol, qty, avg price, buy date.
  2. Set OpenRouter Key — Settings → AI Provider → paste your free key from openrouter.ai. All AI features need this.
  3. Run AI Analysis — Dashboard → "⚡ Full AI Analysis". Analyses all your holdings with AI signals.
  4. Set Stop Losses — In Holdings, click any stock's ▼ to expand → set Stop Loss & Targets.
  5. Add to Watchlist — Portfolio → Watchlist → "+ Watch". AI scores entry quality.
🤖 AI Features
⚡ Full AI Analysis
Dashboard button. Runs AI on every holding — signals, stop-loss, targets. Takes 2–5 min for 30+ stocks.
☀ Morning Brief
Dashboard → Morning Brief. 4-bullet daily AI brief covering market pulse, alerts, risks, LTCG reminders.
🩺 Portfolio Doctor
AI → Doctor. Full diagnosis with sector concentration, fair value gaps, prescriptive rebalance actions.
🌅 Daily Brief
AI → Daily Brief. Detailed daily view: portfolio health, market pulse, opportunities, risks, and AI commentary.
🏆 Opportunity Ranker
AI → Opportunity. Ranks all watchlist stocks by AI entry conviction score to find the best entry now.
📋 Weekly Action Plan
AI → Action Plan. AI generates a personalised 7-day plan: what to buy, hold, trim, and exit this week.
🔍 Stock Deep Dive
Research → Stock Analysis. Full fundamental + technical deep dive on any NSE/BSE stock with AI commentary.
📣 Earnings Preview
AI → Earnings Preview. AI preview of upcoming earnings for holdings in the next 30 days.
📊 Key Screens
Dashboard — Portfolio overview, AI brief, movers, alerts, and quick actions.
Holdings — Full holdings table with P&L, signals, AI targets, and stop losses. Click a row to expand.
Momentum Board — Ranks holdings by momentum score across 1D/1W/1M/3M timeframes.
Risk Console — Max drawdown, beta, Sharpe ratio, correlation, and tail risk scenarios.
Action Center — AI-flagged stocks needing action today: exits, adds, SL changes.
Screener — Scan Nifty 500 by sector, market cap, fundamentals, and momentum.
FII/DII Tracker — Track institutional money flow and net buying/selling by FIIs and DIIs.
Trade Journal — Log trade rationale, review past decisions, track win rate.
⌨ Keyboard Shortcuts
/ · Open search
Esc · Close modals
Ctrl+K · Command palette
0–9 · Enter PIN digits
⚠ Common Issues
AI shows "User Safety: safe" — Wrong model selected. Go to Settings → AI Provider → change to Nemotron Ultra 550B or Llama 3.3 70B.
Rate limit errors — OpenRouter free tier allows ~20 req/min. Wait 60 seconds. The app auto-switches models during rate limits.
Prices not updating — Yahoo Finance rate-limits free requests. Try refreshing in 30-60 seconds. Use "↻" buttons to retry.
Blank morning brief — Click "Force Refresh" link in the brief. If persists, check OpenRouter key in Settings.
Symbol not found — Use NSE symbol without exchange suffix. E.g. RELIANCE, not RELIANCE.NS. App auto-resolves exchange.

📈 Covered Call Income Generator
ℹ Covered calls = sell call options on stocks you own. Earn premium income if stock stays flat or rises slowly. Max profit capped at strike price. F&O eligible stocks only.
